subjects.title: Photosynthesis
subjects.summary: Trace matter and energy through a plant.

modules.title: Where does plant mass come from?

concepts.title: Matter versus energy
concepts.prompt: Teach back where most of a plant's dry mass comes from and how photosynthesis makes that possible.
concepts.learningGoal: Distinguish matter inputs from energy inputs.

concepts.title: Follow one carbon atom
concepts.prompt: Explain how carbon dioxide becomes part of a plant sugar.
concepts.learningGoal: Trace carbon from air into plant biomass.

subjects.title: Digital Signal Analysis & Processing
subjects.summary: Turn waveforms into evidence you can inspect, sample, and explain.

modules.title: Sampling and aliasing
modules.summary: Predict how a continuous cosine appears after sampling and explain when frequencies become indistinguishable.

concepts.title: Sampling frequency
concepts.prompt: Explain how the sampling interval and sampling frequency determine the points kept from a continuous signal.
concepts.learningGoal: Connect sampling interval and sampling frequency.

concepts.title: Nyquist condition
concepts.prompt: Explain why a 400 Hz tone sampled at 600 samples/second can alias.
concepts.learningGoal: Connect sampling rate and the Nyquist condition.

concepts.title: Alias frequency
concepts.prompt: Explain how two frequencies can produce the same sampled sequence.
concepts.learningGoal: Identify an alias frequency and explain why it is indistinguishable after sampling.

subjects.title: AI literacy
subjects.summary: Build reliable habits for working with AI systems.

concepts.title: Ask for observable outputs
concepts.prompt: Rewrite an ambiguous AI request so a reviewer can test its result.
